VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Events

Live sessions, festival visuals, and global performances — the heartbeat of VJs TV. Real-time VJ sets, immersive festival visuals, projection-mapped spectacles, and groundbreaking AV performances worldwide.
